name: execution_date
label: Execution Date
hint: Select execution date

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where deed is executed

name: holding_structure
label: Holding Structure
hint: Select the structure under which the property is currently held

name: family_name
label: Family / Group Name
hint: Enter family, HUF, or trust name

name: trust_name
label: Trust Name
hint: Enter trust name

name: other_holding_structure
label: Other Holding Structure
hint: Enter other holding structure

fields.name: is_minor
fields.label: Minor Co-owner
fields.hint: Tick if this co-owner is under 18

name: guardian_details
label: Guardian Details
hint: Enter guardian details for any minor co-owner and confirm authority to sign

name: property_type
label: Property Type
hint: Select type of property

name: property_description
label: Property Description
hint: Enter detailed description including survey number, area, and boundaries

name: property_address
label: Property Address
hint: Enter full address

name: title_details
label: Title Details
hint: Mention how the property was acquired, such as inheritance or purchase

name: encumbrance_status
label: Encumbrance Status
hint: Select current encumbrance status

name: encumbrance_details
label: Encumbrance Details
hint: Mention any loans, charges, or disputes affecting the property

name: partition_mode
label: Mode of Partition
hint: Select partition mode

name: partition_effective_date
label: Partition Effective Date
hint: Select effective date of partition

fields.name: allocated_portion
fields.label: Allocated Portion
fields.hint: Describe allocated share including area and boundaries

name: possession_clause
label: Possession Clause
hint: Define possession of respective shares

name: common_areas
label: Common Areas / Shared Rights
hint: Mention shared access such as roads, stairs, terrace, well, or irrigation channels

name: consideration_if_any
label: Consideration / Owelty (if any)
hint: Enter any balancing payment between parties

name: liabilities_distribution
label: Liabilities Distribution
hint: Divide loans, taxes, or liabilities among parties

name: easement_rights
label: Easement Rights
hint: Describe rights of way, access paths, drainage, or utility rights after partition

name: revenue_records_mutation
label: Revenue Records / Mutation Clause
hint: Mention updating 7/12 extract, mutation entry, patta, or revenue records after partition

name: poa_signing
label: Signing Through Power of Attorney
hint: Tick if any party is signing through a power of attorney holder

name: poa_details
label: Power of Attorney Details
hint: Enter attorney holder details and registered POA reference

name: map_annexure_ref
label: Map / Survey Annexure Reference
hint: Enter reference to attached survey map, sketch, or annexure

name: indemnity_clause
label: Indemnity Clause
hint: Protection against future claims

name: dispute_resolution
label: Dispute Resolution
hint: Mention arbitration or settlement process

name: registration_required
label: Registration Required
hint: Is registration required?

name: market_value
label: Market Value
hint: Enter market value of the property for stamp duty purposes

name: stamp_duty_details
label: Stamp Duty Details
hint: Mention stamp duty paid or applicable

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law, e.g. Indian laws

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction
